title: Starlink's 'Mini 2' Dish Appears in Firmware With Built-In Battery
summary: New Starlink firmware indicates that SpaceX has started producing a “Mini 2” dish, which features a built-in battery and a sign that it supports even lower power consumption. So it looks like the company may have renamed it the Mini 2.
caption: output/2026-07-20/starlink-s-mini-2-dish-appears-in-firmware-with-built-in-battery.txt
